ot_description: Reworked the full & final settlement — the window now starts from the earliest unpaid month, leave is relabelled to CL/LWP with approval gating, and the complete workflow breakdown is surfaced in the settlement card and F&F PDF. Brought the experience and relieving letters to the official template with gender-aware wording and the branded letterhead, and stood up a local prod environment kept in sync with dev.

standup.name: Smit Parekh
next: Keep the offboarding PRs current as dev advances

tasks.name: Offboarding F&F settlement enhancements
tasks.body: Reworked the full & final settlement behaviour, wording and breakdown
tasks.summary:
- Settlement window now starts from the earliest unpaid month (salary paid on the 10th)
- Relabelled leave to CL/LWP and required F&F approval before issuing, while allowing pre-approval drafts
- Surfaced the full workflow breakdown (expected/actual/payable/overtime/short hours, present days) in the settlement card and F&F PDF
- Fixed the generation 409 by reusing the existing monthly workflow

tasks.name: Offboarding letters & document polish
tasks.body: Brought the experience and relieving letters to the official template
tasks.summary:
- Matched the experience certificate to the provided template with dynamic, gender-aware wording (Mr./Ms., he/she)
- Aligned the relieving letter format and tightened signature spacing across both
- Pinned action-button loading spinners to the clicked button in the offboarding flow
- Enabled the branded letterhead on generated letters in production

tasks.name: Local prod environment & dev sync
tasks.body: Stood up a local prod environment and kept the branch current
tasks.summary:
- Wrote start-local-prod.ps1 and restored the local monarch-portal-prod DB from a prod dump
- Granted ADMIN to smitp@monovative.com for local testing
- Merged latest dev into both repos and verified the backend compile and frontend build

ot_pushed.summary: Reworked the full & final settlement — the window now starts from the earliest unpaid month, leave is relabelled to CL/LWP with approval gating, and the complete workflow breakdown is surfaced in the settlement card and F&F PDF. Brought the experience and relieving letters to the official template with gender-aware wording and the branded letterhead, and stood up a local prod environment kept in sync with dev.
